  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date when the bundle becomes available for sale. Used for seasonal launches, promotional campaigns, and catalog planning.']
  harmonized_tariff_code varchar [note: 'International trade classification code for customs and duty calculation. Required for cross-border e-commerce and Electronic Data Interchange (EDI) with customs authorities.']
  image_url varchar [note: 'URL of the primary product image for the bundle, hosted on Content Delivery Network (CDN). Used for PDP, PLP, and digital marketing assets.']
  is_configurable boolean [note: 'Indicates whether customers can customize bundle components (select variants, add-ons, or substitutions) at purchase time.']
  is_returnable boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the bundle is eligible for return under the standard Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) policy. Some bundles (e.g., personalized, perishable) may be non-returnable.']
  is_subscription_eligible boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the bundle can be purchased as a recurring subscription with automated replenishment.']
  is_virtual boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the bundle is virtual (components shipped separately) or physical (pre-packaged as single unit). Impacts fulfillment strategy and Warehouse Management System (WMS) pick-pack-ship logic.']
  list_price decimal(15,2) [note: 'Manufacturer\'s suggested retail price (MSRP) or original price before discounts. Used to calculate savings and display strikethrough pricing.']
  maximum_quantity varchar [note: 'Maximum number of bundle units a customer can purchase in a single order. Used to prevent inventory depletion and manage promotional limits.']
  minimum_quantity varchar [note: 'Minimum number of bundle units a customer must purchase in a single order. Supports bulk-buy and wholesale scenarios.']
  modified_by_user_code varchar [note: 'Reference to the user or system account that last modified the bundle record. Supports change management and SOX compliance.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the bundle record. Supports change data capture (CDC) and incremental Extract Transform Load (ETL) processes.']
  package_dimensions_cm varchar [note: 'Physical dimensions of the bundle package in LxWxH format (centimeters). Used for warehouse slotting, cartonization, and Less Than Truck Load (LTL) / Full Truck Load (FTL) planning.']
  price decimal(15,2) [note: 'Selling price of the bundle in the base currency. For sum-of-parts strategy, this may be calculated; for fixed price, this is the set amount.']
  pricing_strategy varchar [note: 'Method used to calculate bundle price: fixed price (single price regardless of components), sum-of-parts (total of individual SKU prices), discounted (percentage off sum-of-parts), tiered (price varies by quantity), dynamic (algorithmic pricing).']
  return_window_days varchar [note: 'Number of days from delivery date during which the bundle can be returned. Supports Customer Lifetime Value (CLTV) and Net Promoter Score (NPS) optimization.']
  search_keywords varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of keywords and phrases for Search Engine Optimization (SEO) and internal site search relevance ranking. Improves Click-Through Rate (CTR) and Conversion Rate (CVR).']
  shipping_class varchar [note: 'Shipping method classification for the bundle. Determines carrier eligibility, Service Level Agreement (SLA) targets, and last-mile delivery options.']
  short_description varchar [note: 'Concise summary of the bundle for display on PLP, search results, and mobile views. Typically 150-200 characters.']
  tax_code varchar [note: 'Tax classification code for the bundle, used to determine applicable sales tax, VAT, or GST rates. Integrates with Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) tax engines.']
  total_weight_kg decimal(10,3) [note: 'Combined shipping weight of all bundle components in kilograms. Used for carrier selection, freight cost calculation, and Transportation Management System (TMS) route optimization.']
  upsell_bundle_ids varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of higher-value bundle IDs recommended for upsell. Supports Gross Merchandise Value (GMV) growth and Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) recovery.']

  Note: 'Defines product bundles and kits offered as a single sellable unit composed of multiple SKUs. Captures bundle code, bundle name, bundle type (fixed bundle, configurable bundle, gift set, kit), bundle description, bundle status, pricing strategy (fixed price, sum-of-parts, discounted), bundle price, minimum quantity, maximum quantity, is_virtual flag, and effective date range. Enables cross-sell and upsell mechanics, promotional bundling, and FBA-style fulfillment of multi-item packages.'
}

Table product.bundle_component {
  bundle_component_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the bundle component association record. Primary key.']
  bundle_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.bundle. Business justification: Bundle component must reference its parent bundle to establish hierarchy; existing model only links component SKUs, missing bundle reference.']
  bundle_sku_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the individual component SKU that is part of the bundle.']
  primary_bundle_sku_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the parent bundle product SKU that contains this component.']
  supplier_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the primary supplier for this component. Used for procurement, vendor management, and supply chain traceability.']
  assembly_instruction_text varchar [note: 'Textual instructions for warehouse staff on how to assemble or package this component within the bundle. Used during pick-pack-ship operations.']
  component_price_override decimal(15,2) [note: 'Optional component-level pricing override for this SKU within the bundle context. Used when the component has a different price when sold as part of the bundle versus standalone. Null if standard component pricing applies.']
  component_quantity decimal(10,3) [note: 'The quantity of this component SKU required in the bundle. Supports fractional quantities for items sold by weight or volume.']
  component_role varchar [note: 'The functional role of this component within the bundle (e.g., primary product, accessory, optional add-on, complementary item, replacement part, or sample).']
  component_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of this component within the bundle. Active components are available for sale, inactive are temporarily unavailable, discontinued are permanently removed, and pending are awaiting approval.']
  component_volume_m3 decimal(10,4) [note: 'The volume of this component in cubic meters. Used for calculating total bundle volume for warehouse space planning and shipping container optimization.']
  component_weight_kg decimal(10,3) [note: 'The weight of this component in kilograms. Used for calculating total bundle weight for shipping cost estimation and carrier selection.']
  country_of_origin varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code indicating where this component was manufactured or produced. Used for customs declarations and trade compliance.']
  cpsc_compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this component meets Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) safety standards and compliance requirements. True if compliant, False otherwise.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this bundle component association record was first created in the system. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.']
  display_sequence varchar [note: 'The order in which this component should be displayed in the bundle configurator UI, Product Detail Page (PDP), and fulfillment documentation. Lower numbers appear first.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'The date after which this component is no longer part of the bundle. Null for components with no planned end date. Used for time-bound bundle configurations and product lifecycle management.']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'The date from which this component becomes part of the bundle. Used for time-bound bundle configurations and seasonal product changes.']
  hs_code varchar [note: 'Harmonized System code for this component used for international trade classification, customs duties, and tariff determination.']
  inventory_reservation_priority varchar [note: 'Priority level for reserving inventory for this component during bundle order processing. Lower numbers indicate higher priority. Used by Warehouse Management System (WMS) for allocation logic.']
  is_hazmat boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this component is classified as hazardous material requiring special handling, packaging, and shipping compliance. True if hazardous, False otherwise.']
  is_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this component is mandatory for the bundle. True if the component must be included, False if it is optional or can be removed by the customer.']
  is_substitutable boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this component can be substituted with an alternative SKU during fulfillment if out of stock. True if substitution is allowed, False otherwise.']
  is_visible_to_customer boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this component is visible to the customer on the Product Detail Page (PDP) and Product Listing Page (PLP). False for hidden components like packaging materials or promotional inserts.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this bundle component association record was last updated. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.']
  lead_time_days varchar [note: 'The number of days required to procure or manufacture this component from the time an order is placed. Used for inventory replenishment planning and bundle availability forecasting.']
  minimum_order_quantity varchar [note: 'The minimum quantity of this component that must be ordered from the supplier. Used for procurement planning and supplier contract compliance.']
  modified_by_user varchar [note: 'The username or identifier of the user who last modified this bundle component record. Used for audit trail and data governance.']
  substitution_group_code varchar [note: 'Code identifying the substitution group for this component. Components with the same substitution group code can be interchanged during fulfillment. Null if component is not substitutable.']

  Note: 'Association entity defining the individual SKU components that make up a product bundle. Captures bundle reference, component SKU reference, component quantity, component role (primary, accessory, optional), is_substitutable flag, substitution group code, display order, and component-level pricing override. Supports bundle assembly in fulfillment, component-level inventory reservation, and bundle configurator UI logic.'
}

Table product.relation {
  relation_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for relation']
  seller_profile_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the marketplace seller who submitted or owns this product relationship. Applicable for seller-submitted relations in marketplace models. Nullable for platform-curated relationships.']
  source_sku_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the source catalog item (SKU) from which the relationship originates. This is the product displayed on the PDP or cart page that triggers the recommendation.']
  target_sku_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the target catalog item (SKU) being recommended or related. This is the product suggested to the customer based on the source SKU.']
  approval_status varchar [note: 'Current approval state of the product relationship in the merchandising workflow. Applicable for seller-submitted or algorithmically-generated relations requiring manual review before activation.']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'Username or identifier of the merchandising team member who approved the product relationship for activation. Supports audit trail and accountability for manual curation decisions.']
  approved_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the product relationship was approved by the merchandising team. Supports audit trail and Service Level Agreement (SLA) tracking for approval workflows.']
  click_through_rate decimal(5,4) [note: 'Percentage of customers who clicked on the related product recommendation when displayed, calculated as clicks divided by impressions. Used to measure recommendation effectiveness and optimize display logic.']
  conversion_rate decimal(5,4) [note: 'Percentage of customers who purchased the related product after clicking the recommendation, calculated as purchases divided by clicks. Key performance indicator (KPI) for recommendation quality and revenue impact.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the product relationship record was first created in the system. Supports audit trail and data lineage tracking.']
  display_position varchar [note: 'Ordinal position in which the related product should appear in the recommendation widget on the Product Detail Page (PDP) or cart page. Lower numbers indicate higher priority placement.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date after which the product relationship is no longer active and should not be displayed. Nullable for open-ended relationships. Supports time-bound merchandising campaigns and product lifecycle management.']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date from which the product relationship becomes active and eligible for display in recommendation widgets. Supports time-bound merchandising campaigns and seasonal promotions.']
  is_active boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether the product relationship is currently active and should be displayed in recommendation widgets. True means active, False means inactive or suppressed.']
  last_performance_update_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the performance metrics (impressions, clicks, conversions, revenue) were last refreshed from the analytics pipeline. Supports data freshness monitoring and Extract Transform Load (ETL) orchestration.']
  merchandising_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes from merchandising team explaining the rationale for the product relationship, special handling instructions, or campaign context. Supports manual curation workflows and knowledge transfer.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the product relationship record was last modified. Supports audit trail, change tracking, and incremental Extract Transform Load (ETL) processing.']
  priority_rank varchar [note: 'Business priority ranking assigned by merchandising team to override algorithmic display position. Lower numbers indicate higher priority. Used for strategic product placement and promotional campaigns.']
  relation_source varchar [note: 'Origin or method by which the product relationship was created. Indicates whether the relation was manually curated by merchandising team, generated algorithmically by recommendation engine, submitted by marketplace seller, or derived from specific ML techniques (collaborative filtering, content-based, hybrid).']
  relation_type varchar [note: 'Type of product-to-product relationship. Defines the nature of the recommendation: cross_sell (complementary product), upsell (higher-value alternative), frequently_bought_together (bundle suggestion), accessory (add-on item), replacement (substitute product), spare_part (component or part).']
  revenue_attributed decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total revenue in base currency generated from purchases of the related product that were attributed to this recommendation relationship. Used to measure Return on Ad Spend (ROAS) and recommendation engine effectiveness.']
  strength_score decimal(5,4) [note: 'Numeric score representing the strength or confidence of the product relationship, typically ranging from 0.0000 to 1.0000. Higher scores indicate stronger associations and higher likelihood of conversion. Used by recommendation algorithms to rank suggestions.']
  total_clicks varchar [note: 'Cumulative count of times customers clicked on the related product recommendation. Used to calculate Click-Through Rate (CTR) and Conversion Rate (CVR).']
  total_conversions varchar [note: 'Cumulative count of times customers purchased the related product after clicking the recommendation. Used to calculate Conversion Rate (CVR) and measure revenue attribution.']
  total_impressions varchar [note: 'Cumulative count of times the related product recommendation was displayed to customers. Used to calculate Click-Through Rate (CTR) and assess recommendation reach.']

  Note: 'Defines curated product-to-product relationships between catalog items to power recommendation widgets, accessory suggestions, and replacement/spare part lookups on PDP and cart pages. Stores source catalog item reference, target catalog item reference, relation type (cross_sell, upsell, frequently_bought_together, accessory, replacement, spare_part, compatible_with), relation strength score, display position, effective date range, is_active flag, and relation source (manual_curation, algorithmic, seller_submitted). Integrates with the recommendation engine for personalized suggestions and supports merchandising team curation workflows.'
}

Table product.brand {
  brand_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the brand. Primary key for the brand master record.']
  content_digital_asset_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to content.digital_asset. Business justification: REQUIRED: Brand logos are stored as DAM assets; linking enables brand‑wide logo updates and compliance tracking.']
  parent_brand_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key reference to the parent brand if this brand is a sub-brand or brand extension. Null for top-level brands. Enables brand hierarchy modeling for conglomerates and brand families.']
  primary_category_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key reference to the primary product category or taxonomy node most commonly associated with this brand. Used for brand-filtered Product Listing Pages (PLP) and merchandising.']
  profit_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Brand‑level profitability reporting requires linking each brand to a profit center to aggregate revenue and expenses per brand.']
  approval_date date [note: 'The date when the brand was approved for use in the catalog by the merchandising or brand governance team. Null if brand is still pending approval. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.']
  average_rating decimal(3,2) [note: 'Aggregated average customer rating for all products under this brand, on a scale of 0.00 to 5.00. Calculated from product reviews. Used for brand reputation scoring and search ranking.']
  brand_code varchar [note: 'Short alphanumeric code used as a business identifier for the brand in internal systems, reporting, and integrations. Typically 2-20 uppercase characters.']
  brand_description varchar [note: 'Marketing description of the brand, including brand story, heritage, and value proposition. Used for brand pages and Search Engine Optimization (SEO).']
  brand_name varchar [note: 'The official registered name of the brand as it appears in the catalog and on Product Detail Pages (PDP) and Product Listing Pages (PLP).']
  brand_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the brand in the catalog. Active brands are visible in search and Product Listing Pages (PLP). Inactive and discontinued brands are hidden. Pending approval brands are under review. Suspended brands are temporarily blocked.']
  compliance_certification varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of compliance certifications held by the brand (e.g., ISO 9001, Fair Trade, Organic, GOTS, B-Corp). Used for compliance filtering and regulatory reporting.']
  country_of_origin varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code representing the country where the brand was founded or is headquartered. Used for country-of-origin filtering and compliance reporting.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the brand record was first created in the Product Information Management (PIM) system. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX. Used for audit trail and data lineage.']
  discontinuation_date date [note: 'The date when the brand was discontinued and removed from active catalog merchandising. Null for active brands. Used for historical reporting and compliance. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.']
  featured_rank varchar [note: 'Merchandising rank used to determine the display order of brands on featured brand pages and promotional campaigns. Lower numbers indicate higher priority. Null if not featured.']
  is_exclusive boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether the brand is sold exclusively on this e-commerce platform. Exclusive brands are featured in marketing campaigns and receive preferential merchandising.']
  is_verified boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether the brand has been verified by the platform as an authentic, authorized brand. Verified brands receive trust badges on Product Detail Pages (PDP) and higher search ranking.']
  manufacturer_country varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code representing the primary country where products under this brand are manufactured. Used for tariff classification and World Trade Organization (WTO) compliance.']
  manufacturer_name varchar [note: 'Legal name of the manufacturing entity that produces products under this brand. Used for Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) compliance reporting and product recall management.']
  meta_description varchar [note: 'Search Engine Optimization (SEO) meta description tag for the brand landing page. Used for search engine result snippets and Click-Through Rate (CTR) optimization.']
  meta_title varchar [note: 'Search Engine Optimization (SEO) meta title tag for the brand landing page. Used for organic search ranking and Click-Through Rate (CTR) optimization.']
  owner_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the entity that owns and controls the brand. Values: manufacturer (brand owned by product manufacturer), distributor (brand owned by distribution partner), marketplace_seller (brand owned by third-party seller), private_label (brand owned by the e-commerce platform).']
  registration_date date [note: 'The date when the brand was first registered in the Product Information Management (PIM) system and made available for catalog association. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.']
  search_keywords varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of search keywords and synonyms associated with the brand. Used by the Search and Recommendation Engine for query expansion and Search Engine Optimization (SEO).']
  sustainability_score decimal(3,2) [note: 'Numeric sustainability rating for the brand on a scale of 0.00 to 5.00, based on environmental and social governance criteria. Used for eco-conscious customer filtering and Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) reporting.']
  tier varchar [note: 'Market positioning tier of the brand. Used for pricing strategy, merchandising, and customer segmentation. Values: luxury (high-end designer), premium (aspirational quality), standard (mainstream), value (budget-friendly), private_label (retailer-owned).']
  total_reviews varchar [note: 'Total count of customer reviews submitted for all products under this brand. Used for brand trust signals and Net Promoter Score (NPS) analysis.']
  total_skus varchar [note: 'Total count of active Stock Keeping Units (SKU) associated with this brand in the catalog. Used for brand breadth analysis and merchandising planning.']
  trademark_country varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code representing the jurisdiction where the trademark is registered. Format: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3.']
  trademark_number varchar [note: 'Official trademark registration number issued by the national trademark office. Used for intellectual property verification and counterfeit prevention.']
  updated_by varchar [note: 'User identifier or system account that last modified the brand record. Used for audit trail and accountability in compliance with Sarbanes-Oxley Act (SOX) and General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the brand record was last modified in the Product Information Management (PIM) system. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX. Used for audit trail and change tracking.']
  website_url varchar [note: 'Official website URL of the brand. Used for external brand reference links and customer research.']

  Note: 'Master record for product brands represented in the catalog. Captures brand name, brand code, brand logo URL, brand description, brand website URL, brand country of origin, brand tier (luxury, premium, standard, private_label), is_verified flag, is_exclusive flag, brand owner type (manufacturer, distributor, marketplace_seller, private_label), brand status, and brand registration date. Serves as the SSOT for brand identity referenced by catalog items and used in brand-filtered search and PLP brand pages.'
}

Table product.compliance_certification {
  compliance_certification_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the compliance certification record. Primary key for the compliance certification data product.']
  catalog_item_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the catalog item (SKU) that this certification applies to. Links to the product catalog master data.']
  expense_general_ledger_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.general_ledger. Business justification: Compliance certification costs are recorded against a GL account; linking allows tracking certification expenses per catalog item.']
  age_warning_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator of whether the product requires an age-related warning label (e.g., not suitable for children under 3 years due to choking hazard). True if age warning is required, False otherwise.']
  applicable_market varchar [note: 'The geographic market or jurisdiction where this certification is valid and recognized. Use 3-letter ISO country codes (e.g., USA, DEU, GBR) or regional codes (e.g., EUR for European Union).']
  batch_lot_number varchar [note: 'The manufacturing batch or lot number to which this certification applies. Used when certifications are batch-specific rather than SKU-wide.']
  certification_cost decimal(15,2) [note: 'The total cost incurred to obtain this certification, including testing fees, application fees, and laboratory charges. Used for cost accounting and vendor management.']
  certification_document_url varchar [note: 'The URL or file path to the digital copy of the certification document, test report, or compliance declaration. Used for audit trails and regulatory reporting.']
  certification_number varchar [note: 'The unique certification or registration number issued by the certifying body. This is the externally-known identifier for the certification.']
  certification_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the certification. Valid (active and in force), Expired (past expiry date), Pending (application submitted, awaiting approval), Revoked (withdrawn by issuing body), Suspended (temporarily invalid).']
  certification_type varchar [note: 'The type of regulatory or safety certification. CPSC (Consumer Product Safety Commission), CE (Conformité Européenne), FCC (Federal Communications Commission), RoHS (Restriction of Hazardous Substances), UL (Underwriters Laboratories), FDA (Food and Drug Administration), REACH (Registration, Evaluation, Authorisation and Restriction of Chemicals), California Prop 65 (Safe Drinking Water and Toxic Enforcement Act). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: CPSC|CE|FCC|RoHS|UL|FDA|REACH|California Prop 65 — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  compliance_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional compliance information, special conditions, exemptions, or notes related to the certification.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this compliance certification record was first created in the system. Used for audit trails and data lineage.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'The three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the certification cost (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: USD|EUR|GBP|JPY|CNY|CAD|AUD — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  expiry_date date [note: 'The date on which the certification expires and is no longer valid. Nullable for certifications with no expiration (perpetual validity).']
  hazard_category varchar [note: 'The classification of potential hazards associated with the product (e.g., choking hazard, flammability, chemical exposure, electrical shock, sharp edges). Used for CPSC compliance and consumer safety warnings.']
  issue_date date [note: 'The date on which the certification was officially issued by the certifying body. This is the principal business event timestamp for the certification lifecycle.']
  issuing_body varchar [note: 'The name of the regulatory authority, testing laboratory, or certification organization that issued the certification (e.g., CPSC, UL, TÜV, SGS, Intertek).']
  listing_eligibility_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator of whether this certification makes the product eligible for marketplace listing. True if certification is sufficient for listing, False if additional certifications are required.']
  mandatory_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator of whether this certification is legally mandatory for sale in the applicable market. True if mandatory, False if voluntary or optional.']
  minimum_age_years varchar [note: 'The minimum recommended or required age in years for safe use of the product. Nullable if no age restriction applies.']
  renewal_date date [note: 'The date by which the certification must be renewed to maintain validity. Used for proactive compliance management and renewal workflows.']
  responsible_party_address varchar [note: 'The full mailing address of the responsible party. Required for CPSC compliance and regulatory reporting.']
  responsible_party_contact_email varchar [note: 'The email address of the responsible party for certification inquiries and regulatory correspondence.']
  responsible_party_contact_phone varchar [note: 'The phone number of the responsible party for certification inquiries and regulatory correspondence.']
  responsible_party_name varchar [note: 'The name of the legal entity or individual responsible for ensuring product compliance and maintaining the certification (e.g., manufacturer, importer, private labeler).']
  revocation_date date [note: 'The date on which the certification was revoked by the issuing body. Nullable if certification has never been revoked.']
  revocation_reason varchar [note: 'The reason provided by the issuing body for revoking the certification (e.g., product defect discovered, non-compliance with standard, fraudulent application).']
  scope_of_certification varchar [note: 'A description of what aspects of the product are covered by this certification (e.g., electrical safety only, full product compliance, packaging materials only).']
  standard_reference varchar [note: 'The specific regulatory standard or technical specification that the product was tested against (e.g., ASTM F963, EN 71, IEC 60950, 16 CFR Part 1500).']
  test_report_number varchar [note: 'The unique identifier of the laboratory test report that supports this certification. Links to the underlying test data and results.']
  testing_laboratory varchar [note: 'The name of the accredited testing laboratory that performed the compliance testing (e.g., UL, Intertek, SGS, TÜV, Bureau Veritas).']
  updated_by varchar [note: 'The username or identifier of the user or system that last modified this certification record. Used for audit trails and accountability.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this compliance certification record was last modified. Used for audit trails and change tracking.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'The username or identifier of the user or system that created this certification record. Used for audit trails and accountability.']

  Note: 'Stores CPSC and regulatory compliance certifications and safety metadata for catalog items. Captures catalog item reference, certification type (CPSC, CE, FCC, RoHS, UL, FDA, REACH, California Prop 65), certification number, issuing body, issue date, expiry date, certification status (valid, expired, pending, revoked), applicable market/jurisdiction, hazard category, age warning flag (e.g., choking hazard), and document URL. Mandatory for marketplace listing eligibility and regulatory reporting to CPSC and FTC.'
}

Table product.product_listing {
  product_listing_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the product listing record. Primary key for the product listing entity.']
  campaign_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to marketing.campaign. Business justification: REQUIRED: Listings can be part of a marketing campaign; linking enables listing‑level spend and conversion attribution.']
  item_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to content.content_item. Business justification: REQUIRED: Marketplace listings use CMS‑managed content items for titles and descriptions, enabling version control and SEO.']
  obligation_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.compliance_obligation. Business justification: Listing Compliance Audit uses this FK to verify each listing satisfies its specific regulatory obligation, supporting the Listing Compliance Dashboard.']
  seller_profile_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the seller or merchant account that owns this listing. Relevant for marketplace channels where multiple sellers can list the same SKU. For first-party (1P) listings, this references the company\'s own seller account.']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the master SKU in the product catalog that this listing represents.']
  age_restriction varchar [note: 'The minimum age required to purchase this product, if applicable. Common values: 18 (alcohol, tobacco), 21 (certain regulated products), 13 (COPPA compliance for digital products). Null indicates no age restriction.']
  average_rating decimal(3,2) [note: 'The average customer rating for this listing on a scale of 0.00 to 5.00. Aggregated from customer reviews and used to calculate listing quality score, influence buy box eligibility, and impact conversion rate. Null if no reviews exist.']
  brand_name varchar [note: 'The brand name displayed for this listing on the channel. May differ from master catalog brand if channel-specific branding or private label strategies are used.']
  buy_box_eligible_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this listing is eligible to compete for the buy box on marketplace channels. The buy box is the prominent \'Add to Cart\' section on a product page. Eligibility is determined by factors such as price competitiveness, fulfillment method, seller performance metrics, and inventory availability.']
  category_path varchar [note: 'The hierarchical category path where this listing is classified within the channel\'s taxonomy. Format typically follows a breadcrumb structure (e.g., \'Electronics > Computers > Laptops\'). Used for browse navigation and category-based search filtering.']
  channel_code varchar [note: 'The sales channel where this product listing is published. Examples: WEB (website), MOBILE (mobile app), MARKETPLACE (third-party marketplace), B2B (business-to-business portal), BOPIS (Buy Online Pick Up In Store), SOCIAL (social commerce platform).']
  channel_listing_code varchar [note: 'The unique identifier assigned by the sales channel for this listing. For Amazon-style marketplaces, this would be the ASIN (Amazon Standard Identification Number). For other channels, this is the channel\'s native product identifier.']
  commission_rate decimal(5,2) [note: 'The percentage commission charged by the marketplace or channel for sales through this listing. Used to calculate Gross Merchandise Value (GMV) and net revenue. Expressed as a percentage (e.g., 15.00 for 15%).']
  compare_at_price decimal(18,2) [note: 'The original or suggested retail price shown for comparison purposes to highlight discounts. Used to calculate savings percentage displayed on PDP and Product Listing Page (PLP). Null if no comparison pricing is used.']
  condition_type varchar [note: 'The physical condition of the product being sold through this listing. New: brand new in original packaging; Refurbished: restored to working condition; Used: previously owned; Open Box: new but packaging opened; Damaged: functional but with cosmetic or minor defects.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this product listing record was first created in the system. Used for audit trail, data lineage tracking, and compliance with SOX (Sarbanes-Oxley Act) and GDPR (General Data Protection Regulation) requirements.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the listing price. Examples: USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, CAD.']
  ean_code varchar [note: 'The 13-digit European Article Number barcode identifier for the product. Commonly used in international markets. Equivalent to UPC but with an additional digit for country code.']
  end_date date [note: 'The date when this listing will be or was deactivated and removed from the channel. Null indicates no planned end date. Used for seasonal products, limited-time offers, or product lifecycle management.']
  featured_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this listing is featured or promoted on the channel\'s homepage, category pages, or marketing campaigns. Featured listings receive higher visibility and priority in search and recommendation algorithms.']
  fulfillment_method varchar [note: 'The fulfillment strategy for orders placed through this listing. FBM: Fulfilled By Merchant (seller ships); FBA: Fulfillment By Amazon-style (marketplace fulfillment center ships); 3PL: Third-Party Logistics provider; DROPSHIP: direct from manufacturer; BOPIS: Buy Online Pick Up In Store.']
  hazmat_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the product is classified as hazardous material requiring special handling, labeling, and shipping restrictions. Examples include batteries, flammable liquids, aerosols, and chemicals. Compliance with Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) and transportation regulations is required.']
  inventory_quantity varchar [note: 'The current available inventory quantity allocated to this listing on the channel. This may be a subset of total warehouse inventory based on channel allocation rules and safety stock policies. Used to determine Out of Stock (OOS) status and listing suppression.']
  last_sold_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp of the most recent order placed for this listing. Used to identify slow-moving inventory, calculate Daily Sales Rate (DSR), and trigger automated repricing or suppression rules.']
  listing_status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the product listing on the channel. Active: live and purchasable; Suppressed: hidden due to quality or compliance issues; Pending: awaiting approval or activation; Inactive: manually disabled; Suspended: temporarily blocked; Archived: permanently removed.']
  manufacturer_part_number varchar [note: 'The manufacturer\'s unique part number for the product. Used for product identification, catalog matching, and compliance reporting. Distinct from SKU, UPC, and EAN.']
  maximum_order_quantity varchar [note: 'The maximum number of units a customer can purchase in a single order for this listing. Used to prevent overselling, manage high-demand products, or enforce promotional limits. Null indicates no maximum limit.']
  minimum_order_quantity varchar [note: 'The minimum number of units a customer must purchase in a single order for this listing. Commonly used in B2B channels or bulk purchase scenarios. Null or 1 for standard retail listings.']
  price decimal(18,2) [note: 'The current selling price for this product listing on the channel, in the channel\'s default currency. This is the price displayed to customers and may differ from the master catalog price due to channel-specific pricing strategies, promotions, or marketplace fees.']
  promotional_badge varchar [note: 'A marketing badge or label displayed on the listing to highlight special offers or features. Examples: \'Best Seller\', \'Limited Time Offer\', \'Free Shipping\', \'New Arrival\', \'Exclusive\'. Used to increase Click-Through Rate (CTR) and Conversion Rate (CVR).']
  quality_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'A calculated score (0-100) representing the overall quality of the listing based on factors such as content completeness, image quality, keyword optimization, customer reviews, conversion rate (CVR), and compliance with channel guidelines. Higher scores improve search ranking and buy box eligibility.']
  restricted_shipping_regions varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of geographic regions (country codes, state codes, or postal code patterns) where this listing cannot be shipped due to regulatory, legal, or business restrictions. Examples: \'CA,NY,HI\' for US states, \'DEU,FRA\' for countries.']
  review_count varchar [note: 'The total number of customer reviews submitted for this listing. Higher review counts increase customer trust and improve search ranking. Used in conjunction with average rating for social proof.']
  search_keywords varchar [note: 'Channel-specific search keywords and tags used to optimize product discoverability in the channel\'s search and recommendation engine. Supports SEO (Search Engine Optimization) and SEM (Search Engine Marketing) strategies. Comma-separated or space-separated list.']
  shipping_dimensions varchar [note: 'The package dimensions in format \'Length x Width x Height\' with unit (e.g., \'30x20x10 cm\'). Used for shipping cost calculation, warehouse space planning, and carrier compatibility checks.']
  shipping_weight_kg decimal(10,3) [note: 'The total weight of the product including packaging, measured in kilograms. Used for shipping cost calculation, carrier selection, and logistics planning by the Transportation Management System (TMS).']
  start_date date [note: 'The date when this listing was first activated and made available for purchase on the channel. Used for lifecycle tracking and performance analysis.']
  suppression_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation for why the listing status is \'suppressed\'. Common reasons include: missing required attributes, policy violations, quality issues, pricing errors, inventory unavailability, restricted product category, or failed compliance checks (e.g., CPSC safety standards, PCI DSS for payment-related products).']
  total_units_sold varchar [note: 'The cumulative number of units sold through this listing since activation. Used for Best Seller Rank (BSR) calculation, inventory forecasting, and performance reporting.']
  upc_code varchar [note: 'The 12-digit Universal Product Code barcode identifier for the product. Required for many retail and marketplace channels. Used for inventory tracking, point-of-sale scanning, and catalog integration.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this product listing record was last modified. Tracks changes to listing attributes such as price, status, inventory, or content. Used for change data capture (CDC), audit trail, and synchronization with downstream systems.']

  Note: 'Represents a marketplace or channel-specific product listing that maps a SKU to a specific sales channel (website, mobile app, marketplace, B2B portal, BOPIS). Captures SKU reference, channel code, channel-specific listing ID (e.g., ASIN for Amazon-style marketplace), listing status (active, suppressed, pending, inactive), listing title override, listing description override, listing price, buy box eligibility flag, listing quality score, suppression reason, and listing created/updated timestamps. Distinct from catalog_item as it models channel-specific presentation and eligibility.'
}

Table product.identifier {
  identifier_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the product identifier record. Primary key.']
  catalog_item_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the catalog item or SKU (Stock Keeping Unit) that this identifier is associated with.']
  marketplace_listing_id varchar [note: 'The identifier of the marketplace or sales channel where this identifier is used. Relevant for marketplace sellers who may have different identifiers across multiple platforms (e.g., Amazon, eBay, Walmart Marketplace). Null for identifiers not specific to a marketplace.']
  regulation_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulation. Business justification: Identifier Registry requires each product identifier to be tied to the applicable regulation (e.g., barcode standards) for legal labeling compliance.']
  seller_profile_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the seller or vendor who provided or uses this identifier. Relevant for marketplace models where multiple sellers may have their own SKU schemes. Null for identifiers managed centrally by the platform.']
  barcode_format varchar [note: 'The physical barcode symbology or format used to encode this identifier for scanning and automated data capture. Examples include EAN-13, UPC-A, Code 128, QR Code, Data Matrix, ITF-14. NONE if no barcode representation exists. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: EAN_13|UPC_A|CODE_128|QR_CODE|DATA_MATRIX|ITF_14|NONE — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  check_digit varchar [note: 'The check digit or validation character used to verify the integrity of the identifier value. Commonly used in UPC, EAN, and GTIN codes to detect data entry or transmission errors. Null if the identifier type does not use check digits.']
  compliance_certification varchar [note: 'Certification or compliance standard associated with this identifier. Examples include CPSC compliance for consumer products, FDA registration for food/drugs, CE marking for European products, or FCC certification for electronics. Null if not applicable.']
  country_of_origin varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code indicating the country where the product associated with this identifier is manufactured or originates. Used for customs classification, trade compliance, and regulatory reporting.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this product identifier record was first created in the system. Used for audit trail and data lineage tracking.']
  customs_classification_code varchar [note: 'Harmonized System (HS) code used for international trade and customs classification. This code determines tariffs, duties, and regulatory requirements for cross-border shipments. Typically 6-10 digits depending on country-specific extensions.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'The date on which this identifier ceases to be active or valid. Null indicates the identifier is currently active with no planned end date. Supports temporal tracking and identifier lifecycle management.']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'The date from which this identifier becomes active and valid for use. Supports temporal tracking of identifier assignments and changes over time.']
  external_reference_url varchar [note: 'A URL link to an external registry, database, or authority where additional information about this identifier can be found. Examples include GS1 registry lookup, manufacturer product pages, or regulatory databases.']
  gtin_type varchar [note: 'The specific GTIN format used for this identifier. GTIN-8 (8 digits), GTIN-12 (UPC, 12 digits), GTIN-13 (EAN, 13 digits), GTIN-14 (case/pallet level, 14 digits). NONE if the identifier is not a GTIN.']
  identifier_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the product identifier. ACTIVE indicates the identifier is currently in use; INACTIVE indicates it is no longer used; DEPRECATED indicates it has been replaced by a newer identifier; PENDING indicates it is awaiting verification or activation; SUSPENDED indicates temporary deactivation.']
  identifier_type varchar [note: 'The type or classification of the product identifier. Indicates the standard or system that issued the identifier (e.g., UPC for Universal Product Code, EAN for European Article Number, ASIN for Amazon Standard Identification Number, GTIN for Global Trade Item Number, ISBN for International Standard Book Number, MPN for Manufacturer Part Number, HS_CODE for Harmonized System code for customs, SELLER_SKU for marketplace seller SKU, INTERNAL_SKU for internal SKU). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: UPC|EAN|ASIN|GTIN|ISBN|MPN|HS_CODE|SELLER_SKU|INTERNAL_SKU|CUSTOM — 10 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  identifier_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'The actual identifier value or code. This is the unique alphanumeric string that represents the product in the specified identifier system (e.g., the 12-digit UPC code, the 13-digit EAN, the 10-character ASIN).']
  is_primary boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this identifier is the primary or preferred identifier for the product. True if this is the main identifier used for product lookup and display; False otherwise.']
  is_serialized boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this identifier includes serialization at the unit level. True if the identifier uniquely identifies an individual item instance (e.g., GTIN + serial number for track-and-trace); False if it identifies a product type or SKU only.']
  is_verified boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this identifier has been verified for accuracy and validity. True if the identifier has been validated against the issuing authority or external registry; False if unverified or pending validation.']
  issuing_authority varchar [note: 'The organization or system that issued or assigned this identifier. Examples include GS1 for UPC/EAN/GTIN, Amazon for ASIN, manufacturer name for MPN, or internal system name for internal SKUs.']
  lot_number varchar [note: 'The lot or batch number associated with this identifier, used for grouping products manufactured or received together. Relevant for quality control, recalls, and expiration tracking. Null if not applicable.']
  modified_by varchar [note: 'The username or identifier of the user or system process that last modified this product identifier record. Used for audit trail and accountability.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this product identifier record was last modified or updated. Used for audit trail, change tracking, and data synchronization.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional notes, comments, or context about this product identifier. May include information about identifier assignment rationale, special handling instructions, or historical context.']
  packaging_level varchar [note: 'The level of packaging hierarchy that this identifier represents. EACH for individual consumer unit, INNER_PACK for multi-packs, CASE for shipping cases, PALLET for pallet-level, DISPLAY_UNIT for retail display units. Used for supply chain and logistics optimization.']
  serial_number varchar [note: 'The unique serial number assigned to an individual unit of the product, used in conjunction with the base identifier for item-level traceability. Null if the identifier is not serialized or if serialization is tracked separately.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'The name or code of the source system from which this identifier record originated. Examples include PIM (Product Information Management System), OMS (Order Management System), marketplace integration systems, or EDI (Electronic Data Interchange) feeds.']
  verification_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this identifier was last verified or validated against the issuing authority or external registry. Used for data quality auditing and compliance tracking.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'The username or identifier of the user or system process that created this product identifier record. Used for audit trail and accountability.']

  Note: 'Stores all external and internal product identifiers associated with a catalog item or SKU, serving as the identifier registry. Captures catalog item or SKU reference, identifier type (UPC, EAN, ASIN, GTIN, ISBN, MPN, HS_code, seller_SKU, internal_SKU), identifier value, issuing authority, is_primary flag, is_verified flag, effective start date, effective end date, and source system. Enables cross-system product matching, EDI integration, customs classification, and marketplace syndication.'
}

Table product.seller_sku_mapping {
  seller_sku_mapping_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the seller SKU mapping record. Primary key for the seller SKU mapping entity.']
  agent_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the catalog operations agent or system user who performed manual review or approval of this mapping. Null for automated mappings that did not require human intervention.']
  canonical_catalog_item_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the platform\'s authoritative catalog item (ASIN-equivalent) that this seller SKU has been mapped to. Enables buy box competition and GMV attribution. Null when mapping status is unmapped or pending_review.']
  seller_profile_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the marketplace seller who submitted this product listing. Links to the seller master record in the Seller Management Portal.']
  auto_remap_enabled boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this seller SKU is eligible for automatic remapping if the canonical catalog item is merged or deprecated. False requires manual seller intervention for catalog changes.']
  canonical_brand_name varchar [note: 'The authoritative brand name from the platform\'s canonical catalog for the mapped item. Used to detect brand mismatches and potential intellectual property violations.']
  canonical_category_path varchar [note: 'The authoritative product category hierarchy path from the platform\'s canonical taxonomy that the mapped catalog item belongs to. Used for category compliance validation.']
  compliance_check_status varchar [note: 'Status of regulatory and policy compliance validation for this seller SKU mapping. Includes CPSC product safety, intellectual property, restricted product category, and marketplace policy checks.']
  compliance_failure_reason varchar [note: 'Detailed explanation of compliance check failures including specific regulations violated, policy breaches, or safety concerns. Null when compliance_check_status is passed or not_required.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this seller SKU mapping record was first created in the system. Used for audit trails and data lineage tracking.']
  gmv_attribution_enabled boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether sales of this seller SKU are included in GMV reporting and seller commission calculations. False may indicate mapping is pending or rejected.']
  image_match_score decimal(5,4) [note: 'Computer vision similarity score (0.0000 to 1.0000) comparing seller-provided product images to canonical catalog item images. Used when image_match mapping method is applied.']
  is_buy_box_eligible boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this mapped seller SKU is eligible to compete for the buy box on the product detail page. False may indicate seller performance issues, policy violations, or pricing problems.']
  is_duplicate_listing boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this seller SKU was identified as a duplicate of an existing seller listing for the same canonical catalog item. True indicates the seller is attempting to create multiple listings for the same product.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this seller SKU mapping record was most recently updated. Tracks any changes to mapping status, canonical item reference, or metadata.']
  last_review_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time of the most recent manual or automated review of this mapping. Used for audit trails and re-review scheduling.']
  mapping_confidence_score decimal(5,4) [note: 'Algorithmic confidence score (0.0000 to 1.0000) indicating the certainty of the mapping between seller SKU and canonical catalog item. Higher scores indicate stronger match signals. Used to prioritize manual review queue.']
  mapping_method varchar [note: 'The technique or algorithm used to establish the mapping between seller SKU and canonical catalog item. Exact_barcode_match is highest confidence; manual_review indicates human intervention was required.']
  mapping_source_system varchar [note: 'The system or integration channel through which the seller submitted this SKU for mapping (e.g., Seller Portal UI, API, EDI, Bulk Upload). Used for channel performance analysis.']
  mapping_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the seller SKU mapping. Mapped indicates successful linkage to canonical catalog; pending_review requires manual intervention; rejected indicates failed mapping with reason; unmapped indicates no match found.']
  mapping_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when the seller SKU was successfully mapped to the canonical catalog item. Represents the business event time when the mapping became effective for buy box competition.']
  priority_level varchar [note: 'Processing priority assigned to this mapping request based on seller tier, product category importance, or business rules. High priority mappings are reviewed first in the manual review queue.']
  rejection_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text explanation provided by the reviewer detailing the specific reasons for rejection and guidance for seller remediation. Null when mapping status is not rejected.']
  rejection_reason varchar [note: 'Categorical reason code explaining why a seller SKU mapping was rejected. Used for seller feedback, catalog quality governance, and compliance reporting. Null when mapping status is not rejected. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: duplicate_listing|prohibited_product|insufficient_product_data|barcode_mismatch|category_violation|quality_standards_failure|intellectual_property_violation|other — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  seller_brand_name varchar [note: 'The brand name as declared by the seller in their listing submission. Used for brand validation and intellectual property compliance checks during mapping.']
  seller_category_path varchar [note: 'The product category hierarchy path as declared by the seller in their listing submission. Used for category validation and mismatch detection during mapping.']
  seller_ean_code varchar [note: 'The 13-digit EAN barcode provided by the seller for exact barcode matching to canonical catalog items. Used in international marketplace operations.']
  seller_product_title varchar [note: 'The product title or name as provided by the seller in their listing submission. Used for fuzzy matching and manual review processes.']
  seller_sku_code varchar [note: 'The seller\'s own SKU or product identifier code used in their internal catalog system. This is the seller-provided reference that must be mapped to the platform\'s canonical catalog.']
  seller_upc_code varchar [note: 'The 12-digit UPC barcode provided by the seller for exact barcode matching to canonical catalog items. Critical for automated mapping via exact_barcode_match method.']
  submission_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when the seller originally submitted this SKU listing for mapping. Used to calculate mapping SLA performance and queue aging metrics.']
  title_match_score decimal(5,4) [note: 'Natural language processing similarity score (0.0000 to 1.0000) comparing seller product title to canonical catalog item title. Used when fuzzy_title_match mapping method is applied.']

  Note: 'Maps marketplace seller-submitted product listings to the platform\'s canonical catalog items, enabling multi-seller catalog deduplication and buy box competition. Captures seller reference, seller SKU code, seller-provided product title, mapped canonical catalog item reference, mapping status (mapped, pending_review, rejected, unmapped), confidence score, mapping method (exact_barcode_match, fuzzy_title_match, image_match, manual_review), reviewer reference, rejection reason, and mapping timestamp. Critical for marketplace GMV attribution, catalog quality governance, preventing duplicate listings, and ensuring sellers compete on the same canonical product page.'
}

Table product.brand_seller_agreement {
  brand_seller_agreement_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for the brand_seller_agreement association']
  brand_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to the brand master record']
  seller_profile_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to the seller profile master record']
  agreement_end_date date [note: 'Date when the brand‑seller agreement expires or is terminated']
  agreement_start_date date [note: 'Date when the brand‑seller agreement becomes effective']
  commission_rate decimal [note: 'Percentage of each sale retained by the marketplace from this brand‑seller agreement']
  exclusive_agreement_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the agreement grants exclusive selling rights to the seller for the brand']

  Note: 'This association product represents the contractual agreement between a brand and a seller profile. It captures exclusivity flags, commission rates, and the start and end dates of the agreement for each brand‑seller pairing.. Existence Justification: A brand can be sold by multiple seller profiles and a seller profile can sell multiple brands. The marketplace manages a contract for each brand‑seller pairing that records exclusivity, commission rates, and agreement start/end dates. This relationship is actively created, updated, and terminated by business users.'
}

Table product.sku_asset_assignment {
  sku_asset_assignment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for the sku_asset_assignment association']
  content_digital_asset_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to Digital Asset']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to SKU']
  brand_compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates if the asset complies with brand guidelines for the SKU']
  is_primary boolean [note: 'Indicates if this asset is the primary representation for the SKU']
  license_expiration_date date [note: 'Expiration date of the asset license']
  license_type varchar [note: 'Type of license governing asset usage']
  rights_holder varchar [note: 'Entity that holds the rights for the asset']
  seo_score decimal [note: 'SEO relevance score for the asset when used on the SKU page']
  usage_rights_notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes about usage rights']

  Note: 'Association product representing the assignment of digital assets to SKUs. It captures which assets are primary for a SKU, licensing information, SEO score, and compliance flags. Each record links one SKU to one digital asset with attributes that belong only to the relationship.. Existence Justification: Each SKU can be linked to multiple digital assets (images, videos, banners) and each digital asset can be used by multiple SKUs. The association is actively managed in a product‑digital‑asset table that stores attributes such as primary flag, licensing details, SEO score, and brand compliance. This operational entity is therefore a true many‑to‑many relationship.'
}

Table product.regulation_compliance {
  regulation_compliance_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for the product_regulation_compliance association']
  catalog_item_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to catalog_item']
  regulation_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to regulation']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance state of the product for the regulation (e.g., compliant, non‑compliant, pending)']
  evidence_url varchar [note: 'Link to evidence document or audit artifact supporting the compliance status']

  Note: 'Association representing the compliance relationship between a catalog item and a regulation. Captures the compliance status and supporting evidence for each product‑regulation pair.. Existence Justification: Each catalog item may need to satisfy multiple regulations (e.g., data privacy, payment security) and each regulation applies to many catalog items. The compliance team actively creates, updates, and deletes records linking a product to a regulation, tracking compliance status and evidence for each link.'
}

Table product.brand_compliance_enrollment {
  brand_compliance_enrollment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for the brand_compliance_enrollment association']
  brand_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to the brand']
  program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to the compliance program']
  enrollment_date date [note: 'Date the brand was enrolled in the compliance program']
  program_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the brand within the compliance program (e.g., active, pending, completed)']

  Note: 'Represents the enrollment of a brand in a compliance program, capturing when the brand joined the program and its current status. Each record links one brand to one compliance program and stores attributes that belong only to this relationship.. Existence Justification: Brands are actively enrolled in compliance programs, and each program includes many brands. The enrollment is managed as a distinct business process with enrollment dates and status tracked for each brand‑program link. This many‑to‑many relationship is a core operational entity.'
}

Table order.cart {
  cart_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the cart (primary key).']
  customer_profile_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the customer who owns the cart.']
  price_list_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to pricing.price_list. Business justification: CART PRICING CONTEXT: The cart calculates totals using a selected price list; persisting the list ID enables seamless order conversion.']
  session_id varchar [note: 'Web or app session identifier associated with the cart.']
  abandonment_email_sent_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a cart abandonment email has been sent.']
  abandonment_reason varchar [note: 'Free‑text reason captured (if any) for why the cart was abandoned.']
  cart_number varchar [note: 'Business-facing cart identifier shown to customers and used in support.']
  cart_source varchar [note: 'System or integration source that created the cart.']
  cart_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the cart.']
  channel varchar [note: 'Origin channel through which the cart was created.']
  coupon_code varchar [note: 'Promotional coupon applied to the cart, if any.']
  coupon_discount_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Monetary value of the coupon discount.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the cart was initially created (business event time).']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for monetary values.']
  device_type varchar [note: 'Type of device used to create the cart.']
  discount_total_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Aggregate discount amount from coupons, promotions, and cart-level discounts.']
  estimated_delivery_date date [note: 'Projected delivery date based on shipping method and inventory.']
  expiry_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the cart is scheduled to expire if not converted.']
  gift_message varchar [note: 'Optional message entered by the shopper for the gift recipient.']
  ip_address varchar [note: 'IP address of the client at cart creation.']
  is_gift boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the cart is marked as a gift purchase.']
  item_count varchar [note: 'Count of unique product SKUs in the cart.']
  last_activity_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent interaction with the cart.']
  loyalty_points_applied varchar [note: 'Number of loyalty points redeemed against the cart.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the cart record was first persisted in the data lake (audit).']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the cart record (audit).']
  saved_for_later_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates if the cart is marked as saved for later purchase.']
  shipping_address_city varchar [note: 'City component of the shipping address.']
  shipping_address_country_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter country code of the shipping address.']
  shipping_address_line1 varchar [note: 'First line of the shipping street address.']
  shipping_address_line2 varchar [note: 'Second line of the shipping street address (optional).']
  shipping_address_postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal/ZIP code of the shipping address.']
  shipping_address_state varchar [note: 'State or province component of the shipping address.']
  shipping_fee_estimated_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Estimated shipping cost for the cart.']
  subtotal_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Sum of line-item prices before discounts, taxes, and shipping.']
  tax_estimated_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Estimated tax calculated for the cart based on jurisdiction.']
  total_estimated_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Final estimated amount payable after discounts, tax, and shipping.']
  total_quantity varchar [note: 'Sum of quantities across all cart items.']
  total_volume_cm3 decimal(10,3) [note: 'Aggregate volume of all items, used for logistics planning.']
  total_weight_kg decimal(10,3) [note: 'Aggregate weight of all items in the cart, used for shipping calculations.']
  user_agent varchar [note: 'Browser or app user-agent string for the session.']
  version varchar [note: 'Optimistic concurrency version number for the cart record.']

  Note: 'Represents a customers active shopping cart prior to order submission. Captures session context, channel origin (B2C, B2B, marketplace, mobile app), cart creation and expiry timestamps, applied coupon codes, estimated totals, saved-for-later flag, and cart abandonment signals (last activity timestamp, abandonment email trigger status). Serves as the SSOT for pre-purchase intent and cart-to-order conversion tracking. This is the entry point of the order lifecycle — cart submission triggers order_header creation. Line-item details are held in the related cart_item product.'
}

Table order.cart_item {
  cart_item_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the cart line item.']
  bundle_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the bundle to which this line belongs.']
  cart_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the shopping cart that contains this item.']
  seller_profile_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the marketplace seller offering the product.']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.sku. Business justification: Required for real‑time inventory, pricing and fulfillment; cart item must map to the definitive SKU record used in downstream order processing.']
  user_session_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the user session associated with this cart action.']
  variant_sku_id varchar [note: 'Identifier for the specific product variant (size, color, etc.) selected.']
  added_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the item was added to the cart.']
  backorder_estimate_date date [note: 'Estimated date when the back‑ordered item will be available.']
  coupon_applied boolean [note: 'True if a coupon was applied to this line.']
  coupon_code varchar [note: 'Code of the coupon applied, if any.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for monetary values.']
  device_type varchar [note: 'Type of device used during the add‑to‑cart action.']
  discount_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Monetary discount applied to this line item.']
  fulfillment_method varchar [note: 'Chosen shipping or pickup method for the item.']
  gift_message varchar [note: 'Optional message entered for the gift recipient.']
  inventory_status varchar [note: 'Current inventory condition of the SKU at the time of add‑to‑cart.']
  ip_address varchar [note: 'IP address of the client at the time of add‑to‑cart.']
  is_backorder boolean [note: 'True if the item is currently back‑ordered.']
  is_bundle boolean [note: 'True if the item is part of a product bundle.']
  is_gift boolean [note: 'True if the item is marked as a gift.']
  is_preorder boolean [note: 'True if the item is a preorder.']
  is_promotional boolean [note: 'True if the item is part of a promotion.']
  is_tax_exempt boolean [note: 'True if the line is exempt from tax.']
  item_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the cart line.']
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time of the most recent update to this cart line.']
  line_sequence varchar [note: 'Ordinal position of the item within the cart.']
  line_total decimal(12,2) [note: 'Final net amount for the line after discounts and tax.']
  preorder_release_date date [note: 'Release date when the preorder item becomes available.']
  price_after_discount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Price after discount but before tax.']
  price_before_discount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Original list price of the line before any promotional discounts.']
  promotion_code varchar [note: 'Code of the promotion applied to this line, if any.']
  quantity varchar [note: 'Number of units of the product requested in the cart.']
  referral_source varchar [note: 'Marketing source that drove the user to add the item.']
  shipping_estimate_date date [note: 'Projected date the item will be shipped to the customer.']
  source_channel varchar [note: 'Channel through which the item was added to the cart.']
  tax_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Tax charged on this line item.']
  tax_exemption_code varchar [note: 'Code representing the reason for tax exemption.']
  tax_rate decimal(5,2) [note: 'Applicable tax rate expressed as a percentage.']
  unit_price decimal(12,2) [note: 'Price per single unit at the moment the item was added to the cart.']

  Note: 'Individual line-level SKU entries within a shopping cart. Tracks SKU identifier, quantity requested, unit price at time of add-to-cart, seller ID for marketplace items, product variant details, and item-level promotional flags. Supports cart-to-order conversion analysis and CVR optimization.'
}

Table order.header {
  header_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for header']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.account. Business justification: Required for B2B order processing: links each order to the corporate account used for billing and credit checks, enabling account‑level revenue and risk reporting.']
  audience_segment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to marketing.audience_segment. Business justification: Required for Audience Segment ROI analysis: associates each order with the targeted audience segment, supporting segment‑level conversion and spend efficiency reports.']
  billing_address_order_address_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the address used for billing purposes.']
  campaign_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to marketing.campaign. Business justification: Required for Campaign‑Order Performance tracking: directly ties an order to the originating marketing campaign (e.g., email or ad) for conversion and revenue attribution.']
  channel_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to marketing.channel. Business justification: Required for Order‑Channel Attribution Report: links each order to the marketing channel that drove it, enabling ROI calculations and channel performance dashboards.']
  contact_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.contact. Business justification: Captures the B2B contact person responsible for the order, essential for order support, invoicing, and compliance audit trails.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: REQUIRED: Allocate order fulfillment costs to a cost center for expense tracking and budgeting.']
  entitlement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to service.entitlement. Business justification: Business process: Apply customer\'s support entitlement to each order for SLA and case handling; experts expect an order to reference its entitlement tier.']
  fulfillment_center_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the warehouse or fulfillment center assigned to the order.']
  header_order_address_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the address where the order will be shipped.']
  household_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.household. Business justification: Supports household‑level order aggregation for family plans and shared loyalty, enabling reporting of total household GMV and order counts.']
  merchant_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to payment.merchant_account. Business justification: REQUIRED: Reconciliation reports need the merchant account that processed each order; linking order_header to merchant_account enables accurate financial statements and audit trails.']
  obligation_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.compliance_obligation. Business justification: Order processing must satisfy specific compliance obligations (consumer protection, data privacy); linking allows tracking obligation fulfillment per order for audit trails.']
  payment_gateway_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to payment.gateway. Business justification: REQUIRED: Operational dashboards track which payment gateway handled each order for SLA monitoring and compliance; a FK from order_header to gateway provides this linkage.']
  payment_method_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to payment.payment_method. Business justification: REQUIRED: Storing the tokenized payment method used for an order enables refunds, recurring billing, and fraud analysis; the FK links order_header to payment_method.']
  price_approval_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to pricing.price_approval. Business justification: COMPLIANCE APPROVAL: High‑value orders may need price approval; linking to the approval record satisfies audit and regulatory reporting.']
  price_list_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to pricing.price_list. Business justification: ORDER PRICING AUDIT: Each order is priced using a specific price list; storing price_list_id enables price source traceability for compliance reports.']
  price_zone_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to pricing.price_zone. Business justification: REGIONAL PRICING: Orders are assigned to a price zone to apply region‑specific pricing rules; FK required for zone‑based revenue analysis.']
  profit_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: REQUIRED: Assign each order to a profit center for profit‑center performance reporting.']
  query_log_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to search.query_log. Business justification: Attribution of each order to the originating search query for marketing ROI and search performance reporting.']
  regulation_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulation. Business justification: Tax compliance reporting requires each order to reference the tax regulation (e.g., VAT, sales tax) governing the transaction, enabling accurate filing and audit.']
  segment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.segment. Business justification: Needed for segment‑based order analytics and targeted marketing, allowing each order to be attributed to the customer segment at time of purchase.']
  seller_profile_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the marketplace seller fulfilling the order (if applicable).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the order header record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'ISO 4217 three‑letter currency identifier for the order.']
  delivery_actual_date date [note: 'Date the order was actually delivered to the customer.']
  delivery_estimated_date date [note: 'Projected date for order delivery based on SLA.']
  device_code varchar [note: 'Identifier of the device used to place the order.']
